name: Attach Rigid Body To Link
description: Attach a RigidBody to a robot link inside a RobotCellState. Use for items rigidly mounted on the robot (cable dress-packs, wrist-mounted cameras, etc.).

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the rigid body inside the RobotCell.

inputParameters.name: link_name
inputParameters.description: Name of the robot link the body is attached to.

inputParameters.name: attachment_plane
inputParameters.description: Optional pose of the body relative to the link. Defaults to World XY (body at the link's base).

inputParameters.name: touch_links
inputParameters.description: Optional list of robot link names allowed to collide with the body.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the body attached to the link.
